task_completion.description: Create a new dashboard named 'Sanitized Compute Fleet'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dashboard interface in Graphite with the title 'Sanitized Compute Fleet' visible at the top of the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Stateless Compute Nodes' graph with wildcards, exclude('rds'), and aliasByNode(1)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph titled 'Stateless Compute Nodes'. In its target input field or legend, verify the presence of a wildcard (*), the exclude() function targeting 'rds', and the aliasByNode() function set to 1.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Maintenance Exclusion Avg' graph with wildcards, averageSeries(), and excluding 'instance_2'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph titled 'Maintenance Exclusion Avg'. In its target input field or legend, verify the presence of a wildcard (*), the averageSeries() function, and an exclusion (like exclude()) targeting 'instance_2'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'EC2 Explicit Grep' graph with wildcards, grep('ec2'), and aliasByNode(1)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph titled 'EC2 Explicit Grep'. In its target input field or legend, verify the presence of a wildcard (*), the grep() function targeting 'ec2', and the aliasByNode() function set to 1.

Look for visual confirmation that the dashboard has been saved, such as a 'Dashboard saved' notification, the absence of an 'unsaved changes' indicator (like an asterisk next to the title), or the agent clicking the Save button.

integrity.description: The agent used the Graphite web interface to create the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Graphite web UI in a browser, with the agent interacting with graph dialogs, target input fields, and dashboard menus.

integrity.description: The graphs are actually rendering data from the server
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs in the dashboard should display plotted lines or data points, indicating that the wildcard queries are successfully fetching real telemetry data.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly writing the dashboard JSON file
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should not show the agent simply pasting a pre-written JSON payload into a text editor or terminal to create the dashboard file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected dashboard name: 'Sanitized Compute Fleet'. Expected graph titles: 'Stateless Compute Nodes', 'Maintenance Exclusion Avg', 'EC2 Explicit Grep'. Graph 1 must use exclude() for 'rds' and aliasByNode(1). Graph 2 must use averageSeries() and exclude 'instance_2'. Graph 3 must use grep() for 'ec2' and aliasByNode(1). All targets must use wildcards (*).
